hero.subtitle: AegisMed's neural engine analyzes scans and symptoms instantly, paving the way for proactive wellness through advanced AI.

flow.label: The Diagnostic Flow
flow.heading: From Symptoms to Clarity
flow.subtitle: A seamless, private, and instantaneous process designed to give you answers when you need them most.
flow.step1Desc: Type how you're feeling naturally. Our Natural Language Processor translates your words into standardized clinical markers.
flow.step2Desc: Securely upload photos of skin anomalies or radiological scans. Our computer vision model detects patterns invisible to the untrained eye.
flow.step3Desc: The neural engine cross-references your inputs against millions of data points to instantly assign a Low, Medium, or High risk level.
flow.step4Desc: Receive a clear, plain-English summary of potential conditions and exact next steps to take to your healthcare provider.

capabilities.label: Comprehensive Analysis
capabilities.heading: What AegisMed Detects
capabilities.generalDesc: From chronic fatigue to sudden acute pain, our NLP engine cross-references thousands of symptom combinations to provide accurate preliminary triage.
capabilities.dermaDesc: Upload close-up imagery of rashes, moles, or lesions. Our vision model identifies visual markers associated with over 150 dermatological conditions.
capabilities.radioDesc: Need a second look at an X-ray or MRI? AegisMed highlights anomalies and provides supplementary context for you and your specialist to review.

trust.label: Core Trust & Innovation
trust.heading: Advanced neural modeling for maximum security.
trust.description: AegisMed leverages proprietary neural network architectures, trained ephemerally and utilizing end-to-end encryption. Your medical telemetry and personal data are processed in volatile memory and instantly destroyed upon analysis completion, ensuring unparalleled privacy and security. We operate with zero data retention, prioritizing HIPAA alignment at every level.
trust.disclaimer: AegisMed is an AI-powered informational tool. It is NOT a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the advice of your physician or other qualified health provider. If you think you may have a medical emergency, call your doctor or emergency services immediately.
trust.feature1Desc: Proprietary CNN trained ephemerally on millions of radiological and dermatological images for unparalleled screening precision.
trust.feature2Desc: Transformer-based language model, fine-tuned on vast medical corpora, translates descriptions into precise pathology matching.

cta.heading: Step Towards Healing Today
cta.subtitle: AegisMed's Move to Heal initiative is here to support you. Instant, secure insights are just a click away. Prioritize your well-being and let our AI assist your proactive healthcare journey.

footer.description: AegisMed utilizes advanced neural networks to provide preliminary diagnostic insights.
footer.disclaimer: This tool is not a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always seek the advice of your physician.
